title: John Awakened
body:
![John awakened](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7af7fb45ffe7d17a3765c72a373306894481f26.png)

This remake of the original John mod retains all the classic features that were in the classic John mod, along with some new additions. You can find all three original Johns. More content planned for future updates.

Contains the 3 original johns, Baby John, John, and Mega John. More creatures are planned...
Adds 4 new items, 1 New painting, and the Immortal Sword
A new way to summon Mega John, instead of natural spawning.


<details>
<summary>How to make Items</summary>

To Summon Mega John, you must first get 4 Immortality gems, 4 Netherrack, and 1 Totem of Undying. Once you complete getting the resources you must combine them in this order:

 ![How to make Cursed Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e1fa7ca1edb76e840c9708759023b587a3ca93e.png)

Then take the Cursed Totem and Right-Click with the totem in hand, once you right-click you must wait for Mega John to appear, Be Prepared for the Battle..

To get Immortality Gems you first need to find a John, then kill it. It will drop Immortality Gem Shards, then take 3 Shards and put them in the crafting table (No Order Needed) and collect your Gem.

To craft the Immortal Blade, you must kill Mega John and get the Unbreakable Rod. Then take the rod and 2  Immortality Gems and place them like this:

![How to make Immortal blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/233ead286462a6478da017b73c27a481a1c297d4.png)


</details>



 



Join the Discord for Mod Updates and News!
